events.text: Findings written to `/app/answer.json`: the observed segregation is a placement sequence violation — concrete was dropped freely without a chute/tremie to control fall height, which ACI 301/304R require. Decision is `fail` (high risk) with actions to halt the pour, install drop-height control equipment, evaluate the already-segregated concrete, and re-inspect before resuming.
